# Kit-CAE (Internal)

This document is about internal usage.

## Preparing source for distribution.

DO NOT ZIP SOURCE REPO TO SHIP TO CUSTOMERS.

The source includes internal-only files that include CI-related code and internal-only repo_tools
that should not be exposed externally.

Instead either use the artifacts generated by Gitlab CI job named `stage-for-github` or
use the following steps.

Start by making a fresh checkout of this source code in a new repo. This will avoid accidentally
including any new local files.

```sh
cd [...]/kit-cae
git lfs fetch --all

# CAUTION: if [...]/kit-cae-staged already exists, it will be deleted.
./repo.sh stage_for_github [...]/kit-cae-staged

# On success, kit-cae-staged is ready to be shipped!!!
```
